sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 317 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 1916/25 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for applicant. On 15.10.2025, following order was passed:- “15.10.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel seeks time to reformulate questions of law. At his request, to come up on 05.11.2025.” On 05.11.2025, following order was passed. “05.11.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the applicant. No question of law has been articulated to entertain this reference application. As a last chance, to come up on 19.11.2025.” Today, despite a fixed date having been given to the learned counsel to assist and / or file amended questions of law, learned counsel remains unable to articulate any question of law, therefore, the reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
